settings.title: Returns Overview
settings.body:
PAWD accepts returns on non-personalised items within 30 calendar days of delivery. Items must be in original, unused condition with all tags attached and in original packaging.
Personalised items (engraved tags, custom embroidery) cannot be returned unless faulty or incorrectly made.

settings.title: How to Start a Return
settings.body:
To initiate a return:
  • Email support@pawdstore.com with your order number and reason for return
  • Our team will respond within 4 business hours with a return authorisation and instructions
  • Pack the item securely in its original packaging
  • Ship to the address provided in your return authorisation

settings.title: Exchanges
settings.body:
Need a different size or colour? We're happy to exchange. Contact us at support@pawdstore.com and we'll arrange the exchange once your original item is in transit back to us.
If the new item is a different price, we'll charge or refund the difference.

settings.title: Return Shipping
settings.body:
For change-of-mind returns, the customer is responsible for return postage costs. We recommend using a tracked service as we cannot be responsible for items lost in transit.
Faulty Items: If your item is faulty or we made an error, we cover all return shipping costs. Contact us and we'll arrange a prepaid return label.

settings.title: Refund Processing
settings.body:
Once we receive and inspect your return, we'll process your refund within 2 business days. Refunds are issued to your original payment method.
Please allow 5–10 business days for the refund to appear in your account, depending on your bank or payment provider.

settings.title: Damaged or Faulty Items
settings.body: If your item arrives damaged or is faulty, please contact us within 48 hours of delivery with photos. We'll arrange a replacement or full refund at no cost to you — including return shipping.
